strings.extendedDescription: Most talk is happening at the "OpenStreetMap Belgium" channel. You can ask anything there! The other rooms are for specific subjects.

strings.description: Real life meetups of everyone who is interested in OpenStreetMap
strings.extendedDescription: Physical meetups are great to meet other mappers, ask them questions and to learn a lot. Especially new contributors are very welcome!

strings.name: OpenStreetMap Belgium Local Chapter
strings.description: We help grow and improve OpenStreetMap in Belgium.
strings.extendedDescription: If you want to help to improve and grow the mapping community in Belgium, to make even more people crazy about mapping, OpenStreetMap Belgium is the right place for you!
